name: qoder-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration kit for Qoder CLI. One 'swarm' Skill routes natural-language requests to 10 orchestration patterns (planning, review, execution, research, debugging, visual QA, team coordination) via 7 custom subagents with per-role model tiers (free Qwen for search, GLM for reasoning) — saves 60%+ credits vs all-premium routing. Ported from LazyCodex/OmO + ThreadDeck.
